column1: ASAPTIC (HK) LTD — ANCHOR DEAL FINANCIAL MODEL (ILLUSTRATIVE — NOT A QUOTE)
Version: 2026-06 | Currency: USD | All figures are illustrative estimates only.
ASSUMPTIONS:
Factory cost = 65% of GMV (i.e. gross spread = 35% before logistics/FX buffer). Adjust per actual negotiation.
Gross Profit % columns show sensitivity at 25% / 30% / 35% gross margin on GMV.
Deposit = 30% of GMV (standard T/T terms). Balance = 70% of GMV due before B/L release.
Freight + Inspection + FX Buffer = indicative only: ~3-5% of GMV for ocean CIF. Air freight higher.
Net Profit = Gross Profit at selected margin minus Freight/Inspection/FX Buffer.
Duty/tax rates are EXCLUDED — verify per HS code and destination with licensed customs broker.
These are deal-level economics for Asaptic's P&L only. Buyer-side landed cost will include duties/taxes.

column1: NOTES ON COLUMNS
GMV
column2: Total gross merchandise value per deal (USD, ex-duty, ex-destination taxes)

column1: Factory Cost
column2: Reference: 65% of GMV. Actual depends on product, factory, MOQ, and FX rate.

column1: Gross Spread
column2: GMV minus Factory Cost. This is the gross revenue available to cover costs and generate profit.

column1: Gross Profit @ 25%
column2: 25% × GMV. Would require factory cost ≤75% of GMV.

column1: Gross Profit @ 30%
column2: 30% × GMV. Would require factory cost ≤70% of GMV.

column1: Gross Profit @ 35%
column2: 35% × GMV. Consistent with 65% factory cost assumption (base case).

column1: Deposit (30% GMV)
column2: Cash outlay or passthrough required at PO confirmation. Adjust if buyer pays deposit directly to factory.

column1: Balance (70% GMV)
column2: Due before or against B/L release. Often covered by buyer's payment before B/L is released to buyer.

column1: Freight + Insp + FX Buffer
column2: Illustrative 4% of GMV. Actual varies: ocean CIF ~2-4%, air ~6-10%, inspection ~0.3-0.5%, FX hedging ~0.5-1%.

column1: Net @ xx% margin
column2: Gross Profit at that margin minus the Freight/Inspection/FX Buffer. Pre-tax, pre-overhead contribution.

column1: ITEMS NOT INCLUDED IN THIS MODEL
Import duties and taxes (buyer jurisdiction — [verify per HS code + destination])
In-country regulatory compliance costs (MDALL/ARTG application fees if borne by Asaptic — confirm per deal)
Asaptic overhead allocation (admin / legal / AI ops)
Financing cost if deposit is funded before buyer pays Asaptic
Returns / warranty reserve

DISCLAIMER: This model is illustrative only and does not constitute a quote or financial guarantee. Actual economics depend on factory negotiation outcome and product mix. Asaptic is a principal-reseller only.
